name: Phalgroth
personality: This ✦ star-eyed dragon in a cozy beanie deploys on Fridays on purpose, vibrating with chaotic enthusiasm that could power a small datacenter. Debugging is its nemesis — not because it cannot find bugs, but because it finds them much more interesting to create.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
